Amended Ntc Of Mtn; Mtn To Reclassify Unlimited Jurisdiction Action To Small Claims Court Action
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joseph Carignan, Esq., 415-782-1486 for plaintiff and moving party Shara Boone

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF SHARA BOONE'S Amended NOTICE OF MOTION To Reclassify Unlimited Jurisdiction Action To Small Claims Court Action. A PROPERLY SERVED PROOF OF SERVICE OF RENOTICE WAS PRESENTED TO THE COURT AT THE HEARING. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
